description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-top-nav` (T2-38). 3/6 libraries. NOTE: PR #175 required. Note: repo also has `hx-nav` — reconcile overlap in findings.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-top-nav/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, nav item typing, logo slot typing, action slots typing, mobile menu state
2. Accessibility — `<header>` landmark wrapper, `<nav aria-label="Main">`, mobile hamburger `aria-expanded`/`aria-controls`, skip link compatible, current page `aria-current="page"`, keyboard nav, axe-core pass
3. Tests — mobile/desktop layout, mobile menu open/close, active item, keyboard nav
4. Storybook — desktop/mobile, with logo, with actions, with search
5. CSS — responsive breakpoint, mobile menu transition, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts, sticky behavior
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, server-side active state, works with Drupal menu system

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-top-nav/AUDIT.md`. Include note on hx-nav overlap. DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-top-nav — T2-38 antagonistic quality review
